text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is totally disheartened by Silence
Suzuka's overwhelming abilities. I open a dialogue
with her in the hopes of getting her back on her
feet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Air Groove that I see her as a
challenger—someone who continually challenges
herself to become the ideal for all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if to punctuate these words, she sees the fruits
of her labors in Mejiro Dober, who works
tirelessly with Air Groove as her ideal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing that no matter how high the wall in her
path, she must simply continue facing up to it, Air
Groove stands resolute once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now we can truly focus on the Sapporo Kinen,
where Air Groove must show the world that the
ideal she represents as Empress lives on!
